body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: domain routing + reconciled escalation + pin-gate + cost record
body.description:
**What changed:** routing gains a domain filter + domain-owned prompt; all production model-pins migrated to domain-routing and the explicit-model path gated to 3 sanctioned uses; escalation reconciled to one within-domain difficulty-walk that auto-escalates to the top cloud tier and system_alarms only past it (T-router-failure-bump-escalation); per-call cost/outcome recorded with domain+tier. **Predicted unintended effects:** (1) domain filter over-narrows — a coding call finds NO candidate and system_alarms where an untagged generalist would have worked (back-compat rule: untagged=generalist must match domain=''); (2) migrated devices now get cheapest-capable instead of their old pinned model — QUALITY may regress on reader/intent/summarizer/critic even as cost drops (the intended trade, but watch DONE%/quality per device); (3) the reconciled escalation REMOVES DS's old return-to-CC endpoint and auto-runs the top cloud tier (Claude, paid, unattended) on capability failure — watch for unexpected Claude dispatches and their cost; (4) domain->prompt move could alter the DS prompt if the extracted text isn't byte-identical -> DONE% regression. **Signals to watch:** routing crossing-log shows domain+tier+dollars+outcome per ticket; grep for coding calls with empty candidate set; grep for rejected pins; per-ticket cost lines present; DS DONE% + avg-iterations before/after migration; count + cost of design-tier (Claude) dispatches. **Gate condition:** check by 2026-07-15 or once the batch has run on >=3 live tickets. **Affected files:** None — observation only. **Design rules:** none apply. **Scope boundary:** observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred/clear/partial and close. **Completion criteria:** predicted effects observed and annotated occurred/clear/partial; ticket closed with the observation recorded.
**Test plan:** no tests — observation ticket.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.intention: I intend that the predicted side-effects of domain-routing are observed on live tickets before any of them becomes a silent regression.
